title: Axon Partners With Dutch National Police To Deploy TASER Devices
text: Axon Enterprise Inc (NASDAQ: AXON) stated Dutch National Police (DNP) would equip officers in basic policing across the country with TASER conducted energy devices (CEDs) as critical safety and de-escalation tool. Axon has entered into a long-term partnership with Technisch Bureau H.A.
